description: A rustic still life arranged on a wooden table against horizontal log walls. A large dead fowl hangs from the wall above the table, wings spread. On the table are white eggs, onions, tomatoes, a large head of green cabbage, root vegetables, a dead game bird lying on its side, a cut of dark meat, and scattered greens. A white cloth drapes over the left edge. A round wooden sieve or board hangs on the wall, and bunches of carrots and onions hang from nails.
